hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE 'Cargo\.lock$' && { echo 'blocked: Cargo.lock is generated — run cargo update or cargo add instead' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$path" in *.rs) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && cargo check --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
